partial_progress.details: Added primed theorems but discovered they are not provable with h_GF_not alone. Negation completeness path allows F(psi) to enter chain(k+1) even when GF(psi) ∉ chain(k) but GF(psi) ∈ dc.

review_reason: Plan v8 approach is blocked. Primed theorems have sorries (7 total, up from 4). Need to choose alternative approach: (A) further strengthen hypotheses with GF ∉ dc, (B) direct bounded_witness with lexicographic termination, or (C) modify chain construction.

metadata.blocking_issue: h_GF_not hypothesis insufficient to block all F(psi) paths into chain(k+1)
